acrostic:
RESPONDING TO GOD'S GOODNESS KING DAVID WORSHIPS 
OUR GREAT KING WHO WILL REDEEM US FROM 
YEARS OF DEEP SORROW 
AND PREVAIL FOREVER. 
LET OUR PRAISES GO UP TO JERUSALEM AND BRING HIM GLORY.

18.acrostic: OUR GOD IS OUR ROCK WHO DELIVERS US FROM OUR POWERFUL ENEMIES

22.acrostic: ENDURED THE CROSS TO SAVE ALL NATIONS

25.acrostic: KEEP MY SOUL FROM ALL SHAME

31.acrostic: VINDICATE ME AND BE MY RESCUE

34.acrostic: WE TASTE AND SEE GOD IS GOOD

35.acrostic: OPPOSE THOSE WHO FIGHT AGAINST ME

37.acrostic: SEE THE MEEK SHALL INHERIT THE LAND FOREVERMORE

38.acrostic: HELP ME I AM WEAK AND BROKEN

44.acrostic: REDEEM US FOR WE FACE SLAUGHTER

55.acrostic: HE SUSTAINS ME IN MY TROUBLE

66.acrostic: MY GOD LISTENED TO MY CRY

68.acrostic: SING TO GOD WHO RIDES THE CLOUDS IN TRIUMPH

69.acrostic: FIERCE FLOODS RISE TO MY NECK DELIVER ME GOD

71.acrostic: OLD AGE FINDS ME PRAISING YOU

72.acrostic: MAY HE RULE ALL THE EARTH

73.acrostic: YOUR PRESENCE IS MY ONLY TRUE GOOD

78.acrostic: OUR FATHERS FORGOT HIS WONDERS AND REPEATEDLY REBELLED AGAINST GOD IN THE WILDERNESS

80.acrostic: DO SHINE YOUR FACE ON US

89.acrostic: WHERE IS YOUR ANCIENT COVENANT YOU SWORE TO DAVID YOUR SERVANT

102.acrostic: RESCUE ME GOD FOR MY DAYS FADE FAST

104.acrostic: VERY GREAT ARE THE MAGNIFICENT CREATIONS

105.acrostic: EVERY WONDER IN EGYPT SHOWS GODS FAITHFULNESS TO THEM

106.acrostic: REMEMBER HOW THEY REBELLED YET GOD SAVED THEM FOR HIS NAME

107.acrostic: LET THE REDEEMED OF THE LORD SAY SO HE DELIVERED THEM

109.acrostic: THEY SPEAK FALSE LIES AGAINST MY LIFE

116.acrostic: I CRY OUT AND HE SAVES ME

119.acrostic:
STUDYING STATUTES SUSTAINS STRIVING SERVANTS. 
THINKERS TREASURE THINKING TIMELESS THOUGHTS. 
ENDURING EVIDENCE EMPOWERS EVERYONE ENTERING ETERNITY. 
PURSUING POWERFUL PRECEPTS PRODUCES PROFOUND PLEASURE.

135.acrostic: ABOVE ALL GODS IS THE LORD

136.acrostic: NOTE HIS MERCY ENDURES FOR EVER

139.acrostic: READ MY HEART LORD AND KNOW ME

145.acrostic: MY GOD AND KING I EXALT YOU
